data.content: Shipment review APPROVED. Commit 32bf30fb5805 is on main. Fix: replaced `flex-1` (useless, parent not flex) + missing `w-full` with `block w-full` on the title input, and stripped all visible border/bg/ring chrome for seamless inline editing appearance. Layout verified: input sits inside a `min-w-0 flex-1` container that is a flex sibling of the Close button — no overlap possible. CI: both CI and Coverage Badge workflows completed successfully (green). No invariants on this knot. Change is scoped entirely to the input className in `TitleEditor` in `beat-detail-lightbox.tsx` — no other behavior altered.
